author: Sungjoon Park
name: 11L EMA + AdamW TTT (10ep, lr=0.0005)
blurb: Replaces SGD with AdamW for test-time training. AdamW(lr=0.0005, wd=0.0) for 10 epochs reduces TTT time from ~260s to ~157s while improving mean BPB by -0.019 vs prior SOTA. All other settings identical to PR #398 (11L, EMA 0.997, SmearGate, BigramHash 2048, int6+zstd).
